3219480.name: Duck Paradox Soundtrack
3219480.description:
Dive into Dr. Paraducks’ quest with the Duck Paradox Original Soundtrack. The original soundtrack contains seven tracks that follow the action, devotion, and infinite worlds of Duck Paradox. Enjoy a mix of retro arcade game beats with the hard-hitting retrowave/modern production style. 

1 - Duckwash Dimension  2:58

2 - Duck Paradox 2:58

3 - InvinciDuck  0:23

4 - Disco Quack  2:48

5 - Timeless Island 2:35

6 - Quack To Start 1:21

7 - She's Unstoppable 4:14

Total running time: 17:19

OST composed by Adam Brown. 

Bonus track: “She’s Unstoppable” written and performed by Chris Klimecky.
